articles.title: Suthar's debut six-for powers India to their biggest Test win
articles.description: After Suthar helped skittle Afghanistan for 152 in their first innings, Washington Sundar and Kuldeep Yadav sealed the win

articles.title: Atkinson five-for seals England win on up-and-down Lord's pitch
articles.description: The pitch made batting so treacherous that a wicket fell every 24.9 balls, the quickest rate in a Test in England since 1907

articles.title: Tamim Iqbal elected new BCB president
articles.description: The former Bangladesh captain will serve a four-year term, having already completed two months as the president of an ad-hoc committee

articles.title: Shreyas confirmed as India's T20I captain; Suryakumar dropped
articles.description: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi has been picked in an India squad for the first time

articles.title: KS Bharat announces retirement from international cricket
articles.description: He represented India in seven Test matches, including in the 2023 WTC final

articles.title: Shaun Tait resigns as Bangladesh fast bowling coach
articles.description: After 12 months in the role, he is stepping down to prioritise family time

articles.title: Explained: Why Jofra Archer isn't in England's Test squad
articles.description: England head into first Test of home summer with Archer deemed "unavailable" after the IPL

articles.title: New Zealand home summer to start with blockbuster all-format India tour
articles.description: The New Zealand men's side will also host Sri Lanka for an all-format tour, while the women will host Bangladesh for three T20Is and as many ODIs

articles.title: Melbourne Stars and Renegades set to merge, second franchise to be sold in full
articles.description: The Stars' name and colours will be rebranded by CV; Renegades could play under caretaker administration in 2026-27

articles.title: 'Whenever you lead India A, think of India' - Tilak Varma reveals Gautam Gambhir's advice ahead of tri-nation series in Sri Lanka
articles.description: "I never dreamt of leading my country. It’s a big opportunity. Leading the country is the biggest thing," Tilak Varma said ahead of India A's tri-nation series.

articles.title: Travis Head granted personal leave, Mitchell Marsh ruled out of Australia’s ODI series against Bangladesh
articles.description: Head, who was originally named in both the ODI and T20I squads for the Bangladesh tour, has been granted personal leave.

articles.title: 'Let him be, don't expect the world' - Sourav Ganguly's massive statement on Vaibhav Sooryavanshi
articles.description: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi has become the blue-eyed boy of Indian cricket after putting in some mind-boggling performances during the recently concluded Indian Premier League (IPL) 2026.
